tankerman_pic_lg_dl_finish_date: Training complete - fast track to Tankerman PIC
mmc_submission_timing: USCG MMC training complete - endorsements in process and ready for immediate transfer
pitch: Versatile Able Seaman and Tankerman Assistant with 250 documented deck days and 3 years of maritime experience across offshore drillships and inland tug/barge operations. Proficient in Tank Barge Dangerous Liquids (DL) and Liquid Gas (LG) cargo transfers, RFPNW watchstanding, mooring, towing, and emergency response. USCG-approved STCW, AB, VPDSD, PSC, and Tankerman DL/LG training complete, with MMC endorsements in process and immediate availability for Gulf Coast or rotational work.
sea_days_note: 250 documented deck days and 3 years of maritime experience across offshore drillships and inland tug/barge operations.
career_goals: Seeking immediate Inland Tankerman, AB-ATB, OSV, or dredge roles with a fast track to Tankerman PIC.
work_environment: Safety-first Gulf Coast or rotational vessel operations with demanding deck work, line handling, towing, and cargo transfer responsibilities.
cover_letter: I bring 250 documented deck days, 3 years of maritime experience, Tankerman DL/LG training, RFPNW watchstanding experience, and a zero-incident safety record. I am ready for immediate transfer into Inland Tankerman, AB-ATB, OSV, or dredge work and can contribute reliable Day-1 deck support, cargo-transfer discipline, and strong physical readiness.
company_message: I am looking for a hands-on maritime role where I can contribute immediately in deck, towing, dredge, or tankerman support operations while advancing toward Tankerman PIC.
